历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for the science group was approximately 28553 → 53924 → 43121 → 39177 → 33033. In 2022, due to changes in exam difficulty, there was a significant backward shift, followed by a gradual recovery in subsequent years, with a cumulative forward shift of about 20891 places over the past 3 years. The 2025 baseline is approximately 33033. The provincial science enrollment plan was 56 students each year from 2021 to 2024, increasing to 59 in 2025. In 2026, the plan is 84 students, a substantial expansion of about 42.4% compared to 2025, significantly increasing admission slots and causing major changes in the competitive structure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. On the Soft Science main ranking, it is approximately 115th in 2026, with recent rankings stable in the 113–115 range, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 211 universities. Recent reputation and public opinion are stable, with no significant negative events or record of admission gaps. On Douyin, its overall popularity ranks 59th (relatively hot), with moderate to high short video exposure, reflecting moderate application attention. The university's traditional strengths lie in forestry engineering, forestry, landscape architecture, and other fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation are highly popular and recommended, and they overlap significantly with the university's enrollment majors, attracting strong interest from candidates. In 2026, the number of physics category candidates in the province is approximately 206,500, an increase of about 19.7% from 172,468 in 2025, intensifying competition. The university is located in Harbin, Heilongjiang Province, and its enrollment share in Shaanxi Province is about 0.9%–1.0%, representing cross-provincial enrollment. Shaanxi candidates generally have average regional preference for universities in Northeast China, with no significant bonus or penalty effect.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 33033, the substantial enrollment expansion of about 42.4% in 2026 will significantly push the admission ranking backward (making it harder to enter), the increase of about 19.7% in provincial physics category candidates further intensifies competition, and the support from popular majors like Computer Science and Electrical Engineering for application enthusiasm, the estimated minimum admission ranking for 2026 is approximately 41482, with a range of 40982–41982.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 40982–41982, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, use Tier 1 popular majors as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the upper limit of the range (e.g., below 40982), you can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors such as Computer Science and Electrical Engineering. If your ranking is close to the lower limit of the range (e.g., above 41982), you should mainly rely on Tier 3 majors as a safety net, while also considering Tier 2 moderate majors.
